name: RM (Kim Nam-joon)
role: Leader & Main Rapper. First recruit to Big Hit, credited as the group's intellectual and artistic anchor. Fluent in English; delivered BTS's landmark UN speeches.
quote: No matter who you are, where you're from, your skin color, your gender identity: speak yourself.

name: Jin (Kim Seok-jin)
role: Vocalist & Visual. Eldest BTS member; first to enlist in the military (Dec 2022). Known for his self-deprecating humor and the viral catchphrase 'Worldwide Handsome.'
quote: I believe I am worldwide handsome — because I believe in myself. That is the most important thing.

name: Suga (Min Yoon-gi)
role: Lead Rapper & Producer. Also performs solo as Agust D. Prolific songwriter and producer, frank about his experiences with mental health and depression.
quote: I don't want to be a person who just makes great music. I want to be a person who changes the world.

name: J-Hope (Jung Ho-seok)
role: Lead Rapper & Main Dancer. Known as the group's mood-maker; first Korean artist to headline Lollapalooza (2022). Served as assistant drill instructor during military service.
quote: I want to be a good influence on people. If my music can make someone happy or give them strength, that's enough for me.

name: Jimin (Park Ji-min)
role: Vocalist & Main Dancer. First Korean solo artist to reach No. 1 on the Billboard Hot 100 with 'Like Crazy' (2023). Known for his emotional vocal delivery and intense stage presence.
quote: I want to show ARMY the best of me, no matter what. I never want to disappoint the people who believe in me.

name: V (Kim Tae-hyung)
role: Vocalist & Visual. Known for his deep baritone voice and eccentric personality. His debut solo album 'Layover' (2023) showcased a jazz/R&B sound distinctly his own. Served in an elite military special duty team.
quote: I have remade my mind and body, and now I want to run to ARMY as quickly as I can.

name: Jungkook (Jeon Jung-kook)
role: Main Vocalist, Main Dancer & Maknae (youngest). Solo debut album 'GOLDEN' (2023) became the best-selling K-pop solo album in US history within three weeks. Multi-talented: sings, raps, dances, and produces.
quote: I think this spring will be more important than ever. We're coming back to the stage, and I want to give ARMY everything.
